title: Thai Sirloin Steak with Khao Pad
description: A decadent and flavorful dish featuring sirloin steak served with a side of khao pad, a Thai-style fried rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the sirloin steak with salt and pepper. Sear the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness. Transfer the steak to a plate and let it rest.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in the same skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped scallions and cook until they are lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the pad thai seasoning and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar to the skillet and stir-fry for another minute.
Slice the rested sirloin steak against the grain and serve with the khao pad.
